# max CP Inc. degree           = 10

# Restrict outgoing arcs       = false

# portion of constraints for MP  = false

# use zones for vehicle portion  = false

# number of pickups allowed    = 2

# populate Time Limit          = 200
# MIP Gap                      = 0
